name: senderkit
description: Add and operate transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push notifications with SenderKit — welcome emails, password resets, OTP and verification codes, magic links, receipts, and notification systems. SenderKit sends directly or routes through providers like Resend, SendGrid, Postmark, Mailgun, SES, Twilio, FCM, APNs, and Expo, so apps aren't locked into one vendor. Works in code (SDK/REST) and at runtime via MCP.

interface.longDescription: Add and operate transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push with SenderKit: welcome emails, password resets, OTP/verification codes, magic links, receipts, and notification systems. SenderKit sends directly or routes through providers like Resend, SendGrid, Postmark, Twilio, FCM, APNs, and Expo (no vendor lock-in). The integration skill wires SenderKit into your codebase; the MCP skill sends and inspects messages at runtime through SenderKit MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: Add a welcome email when a user signs up.
Set up SMS OTP / verification codes in this app.
Send a test email and check its status via SenderKit MCP.
